---
name: New Adapter
about: Request or propose a new integration adapter
title: "[Adapter] "
labels: adapter, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Adapter Type

- [ ] Payment provider
- [ ] OAuth provider
- [ ] Messaging (SMS/Email)
- [ ] Push notification
- [ ] Database

## Provider

Name of the service/provider (e.g., Square, Clerk, Resend).

## Why

Why should quikdb-frame support this provider? Who uses it?

## API Documentation

Link to the provider's API docs.

## Willing to Implement?

- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] No, requesting someone else implement this
